# Assignment 4 – K-Means Clustering

**Student:** Robert Andoh

## Objective
Apply K-Means clustering to group pharmaceutical companies based on financial characteristics.

## Dataset
Pharmaceuticals.csv

## Methods
- Data inspection
- Variable selection
- Data standardization
- Elbow Method
- K-Means Clustering (k = 3)
- Cluster profiling
- Cluster visualization

## Results

Three clusters were identified:

| Cluster | Number of Firms |
|----------|----------|
| 1 | 4 |
| 2 | 11 |
| 3 | 6 |

Cluster 2 contained the largest and most profitable firms. Cluster 1 represented moderately sized firms with average performance. Cluster 3 consisted of smaller firms with higher leverage and stronger growth rates.

## Files Included

- Assignment_4_Robert_Andoh.Rmd
- Assignment_4_Robert_Andoh.pdf
- Pharmaceuticals.csv
